name: ficta-monorepo
description: Workspace root for ficta (packages/ficta) and its chat UI (apps/gateway). Not published.

scripts.//turbo: Turbo-managed: cached, parallel across all packages. See turbo.json
scripts.//pnpm: pnpm-orchestrated: interactive / write / dev servers, not cached
scripts.sidecars: docker compose -f docker-compose.sidecars.yml --profile gateway --profile engine up -d --wait --build
scripts.sidecars:down: docker compose -f docker-compose.sidecars.yml --profile gateway --profile engine --profile openmed down
scripts.//release: Releases are managed by Changesets. Author notes with `pnpm changeset`; CI (.github/workflows/publish.yml) opens a Version PR and, on merge, runs `release` to publish @serovaai/ficta + @serovaai/ficta-protocol together via npm OIDC.
